response.original_title: The Wall: A Solar Opposites Story
response.overview: Deep inside the walls of a suburban home, a miniaturised civilisation has taken root. What began as a simple terrarium has evolved into a sprawling society of tiny humans — complete with its own politics, wars, romances, betrayals, and legends. This feature-length compilation follows the complete story of The Wall across all four seasons of Solar Opposites, edited into a single continuous narrative. From the earliest days of the first shrunken survivors to the epic struggles of the Resistance, the machinations of the Duke, the mysteries of the Mole, and the world-changing events of the Back Yard, this is the full human saga playing out in miniature — entirely separate from the alien family who unknowingly built their world. A survival story. A political thriller. A love story. A tragedy. All happening six inches tall.
response.title: The Wall: A Solar Opposites Story
